logoutDialog.message: Are you sure you want to log out?

hero.title: “Mujibai”… Smartly serving your customers
hero.subTitle: Instantly!
hero.description: With a deep understanding of your business and fluent Saudi dialect, “Mujibai” comes as your advanced cloud-based voice assistant. Fully developed using the latest AI technologies, it helps you communicate professionally with your customers in the Saudi dialect. It understands call context, responds instantly, creates tickets, and provides accurate reports—empowering you to make the right decisions quickly and confidently.

features.title: “Mujibai” features… bringing you closer to your customers!
features.description: “Mujibai” offers powerful features that make it your ideal choice for customer communication

featureOne.title: Instant voice responses in the Saudi dialect
featureOne.description: Natural, accurate, and aligned with your brand identity

featureTwo.title: Call analysis and summarization
featureTwo.description: Highlighting the issue and customer satisfaction level

featureThree.title: Automatic ticket creation
featureThree.description: To forward them directly to your support team

featureFour.title: Comprehensive dashboard
featureFour.description: Allowing you to monitor calls, performance, and customer satisfaction

featureFive.title: Integration with leading applications
featureFive.description: Such as: Google Sheets, Slack, WhatsApp, Salla, Zid, and more.

featureSix.title: Fully cloud-based
featureSix.description: No on-premise installation or additional hardware required

targetedSectors.title: Who benefits from “Mujibai”?
targetedSectors.subTitle: “Mujibai” can adapt to meet the needs of organizations across various sectors such as

sectorFive.title: E-commerce stores on Salla and Zid platforms

propsOne.title: Wise in responses
propsOne.description: Thanks to its deep understanding of customer needs in the Saudi market and its ability to speak naturally in the Saudi dialect.

propsTwo.title: Precise in analysis
propsTwo.description: “Mujibai” is built entirely in-house without relying on external tools, ensuring high-quality customer service and exceptional accuracy in analyzing customer feedback on your services or products.

propsThree.title: A trusted decision-making partner
propsThree.description: By providing clear summaries that turn calls into actionable data, guiding you toward the right decisions.

propsFour.title: Supportive in quality improvement
propsFour.description: By reducing pressure on your team through 24/7 call handling, without compromising customer commitments or requiring additional human resources.

propsFive.title: Efficient in use
propsFive.description: Highly flexible and customizable to match your industry, delivering responses and tone aligned with your brand identity.

aboutUs.title: About “Mujibai”
aboutUs.subTitle: A Saudi-built AI assistant—by design and by voice—serving Saudi organizations professionally
aboutUs.description: “Mujibai” is an intelligent voice system fully developed in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It aims to empower small and medium-sized enterprises to deliver professional, fast, and efficient customer service by leveraging AI to understand the Saudi dialect and its context in line with the local market. This provides Saudi organizations with advanced technical capabilities that enhance competitiveness and contribute to the digital transformation goals of Saudi Vision 2030.

contactUs.title: Contact
contactUs.description: We are here to help you. Reach out to us for any inquiries.

footer.description: Provide a professional patient experience by automatically responding to booking appointments.
